testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
13:20:38.565 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.harborgrid.turboasset.TurboAssetOracleApplicationTests]: TurboAssetOracleApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:20:38.653 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.harborgrid.turboasset.TurboAssetOracleApplication for test class com.harborgrid.turboasset.TurboAssetOracleApplicationTests

create table assets ( current_value numeric(19,2), is_active boolean not null, purchase_price numeric(19,2), created_at timestamp(6) not null, purchase_date timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), warranty_expiry_date timestamp(6), id RAW(16) not null, organization_id RAW(16), property_id RAW(16), asset_tag varchar(255) not null unique, asset_type varchar(255) not null check (asset_type in ('FURNITURE','EQUIPMENT','VEHICLE','TECHNOLOGY','INFRASTRUCTURE','OTHER')), description varchar(255), location varchar(255), manufacturer varchar(255), model varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, serial_number varchar(255), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE','MAINTENANCE','DISPOSED','LOST')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table assets ( current_value numeric(19,2), is_active boolean not null, purchase_price numeric(19,2), created_at timestamp(6) not null, purchase_date timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), warranty_expiry_date timestamp(6), id RAW(16) not null, organization_id RAW(16), property_id RAW(16), asset_tag varchar(255) not null unique, asset_type varchar(255) not null check (asset_type in ('FURNITURE','EQUIPMENT','VEHICLE','TECHNOLOGY','INFRASTRUCTURE','OTHER')), description varchar(255), location varchar(255), manufacturer varchar(255), model varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, serial_number varchar(255), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE','MAINTENANCE','DISPOSED','LOST')), primary key (id) ) 2025-09-05 13:20:42 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table organizations ( is_active boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6), id RAW(16) not null, address JSON, default_currency varchar(255) not null, default_language varchar(255) not null, default_timezone varchar(255) not null, description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table organizations ( is_active boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6), id RAW(16) not null, address JSON, default_currency varchar(255) not null, default_language varchar(255) not null, default_timezone varchar(255) not null, description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) 2025-09-05 13:20:42 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table properties ( acquisition_cost numeric(19,2), current_value numeric(19,2), floors_count integer, is_active boolean not null, rentable_area numeric(19,2), total_area numeric(19,2), usable_area numeric(19,2), year_built integer, acquisition_date timestamp(6), created_at timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6), id RAW(16) not null, organization_id RAW(16), address JSON, area_unit varchar(255), description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, property_type varchar(255) not null check (property_type in ('OFFICE','WAREHOUSE','RETAIL','MANUFACTURING','MIXED_USE','RESIDENTIAL','LAND','OTHER')), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE','UNDER_CONSTRUCTION','FOR_SALE','SOLD','LEASED','VACANT')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table properties ( acquisition_cost numeric(19,2), current_value numeric(19,2), floors_count integer, is_active boolean not null, rentable_area numeric(19,2), total_area numeric(19,2), usable_area numeric(19,2), year_built integer, acquisition_date timestamp(6), created_at timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6), id RAW(16) not null, organization_id RAW(16), address JSON, area_unit varchar(255), description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, property_type varchar(255) not null check (property_type in ('OFFICE','WAREHOUSE','RETAIL','MANUFACTURING','MIXED_USE','RESIDENTIAL','LAND','OTHER')), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE','UNDER_CONSTRUCTION','FOR_SALE','SOLD','LEASED','VACANT')), primary key (id) ) 2025-09-05 13:20:42 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table users ( is_active boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, last_login_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), department_id RAW(16), id RAW(16) not null, organization_id RAW(16), currency varchar(255) not null, email varchar(255) not null unique, first_name varchar(255) not null, language varchar(255) not null, last_name varchar(255) not null, password_hash varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('SUPER_ADMIN','ADMIN','MANAGER','USER','READONLY')), timezone varchar(255) not null, username varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( is_active boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, last_login_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), department_id RAW(16), id RAW(16) not null, organization_id RAW(16), currency varchar(255) not null, email varchar(255) not null unique, first_name varchar(255) not null, language varchar(255) not null, last_name varchar(255) not null, password_hash varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('SUPER_ADMIN','ADMIN','MANAGER','USER','READONLY')), timezone varchar(255) not null, username varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) 2025-09-05 13:20:42 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL -
